summary: Reviewed 1 file(s) in commit target 7044a8a032e85b6ab611033b2ac8af7ce85805b2: The PR adds instructions for Git setup to README, but the formatting lacks separation between commands and descriptions, and the file is missing a trailing newline.

findings.title: Commands and descriptions are concatenated without separation
findings.description: Lines 2-4 contain shell commands immediately followed by their descriptions with no whitespace or delimiter, making them hard to read and potentially misleading.
findings.evidence: Line 2: '$ mkdir ~/Hello-WorldCreates a directory ...' no space after 'Hello-World'. Line 3: '$ cd ~/Hello-WorldChanges ...' no space. Line 4: '$ git initSets up ...' no space.
findings.suggestion: Separate the command and description with a space, colon, or put them on separate lines.
